evidence: skills/uno-synthesize/SKILL.md:50-53 (ingest -> findings via writers/notion -> STOP); references/method.md:41-49 (no source no claim; coverage; unknowns to open questions); references/method.md:66-68 (PRD on explicit yes only); docs/conventions/notion.md:20 (Research & notes DB allowlisted, uno writes / human reviews); SKILL.md:71 (Tier-2 load notion.md on any Notion write)
notes: Live tabletop synthesis on a synthetic 3-source bundle (6-msg Slack thread on double-bookings, 10-line tutor interview, 4-week support-ticket table). 4 findings produced, every claim cited to msg/line/row; all 3 sources in coverage, none dropped; genuine unknowns parked in open questions; recommendation stated then hard stop at the two designer gates without drafting a PRD.
